user_query: I am organizing a company picnic and need to find a suitable location with good weather conditions. Could you fetch the 16-day weather forecast for our chosen destination? Also, I would like to know if there are any active weather alerts in that area.

TaskList.description: Fetch the 16-day weather forecast for the chosen destination to assess weather conditions for the picnic.
Check for any active weather alerts in the area of the chosen destination to ensure safety during the event.
